introSection: Loop-Dee-Doop-Dee is a steel indoor kiddie roller coaster located at Universal Studios Beijing in Tongzhou, Beijing, China. It opened on 20 September 2021 along with the park.

sections.title: Trains
sections.content: Single train with 9 cars. Riders are arranged 2 across in a single row for a total of 18 riders.

fullText:
Loop-Dee-Doop-Dee is a steel indoor kiddie roller coaster located at Universal Studios Beijing in Tongzhou, Beijing, China. It opened on 20 September 2021 along with the park.



Single train with 9 cars. Riders are arranged 2 across in a single row for a total of 18 riders.
